last_reflection:
You're asking for full-body on a square canvas. That's why every portrait comes back chest-up — the body physically doesn't fit. Tall canvas fixes it, not more adjectives. Let me draw it right.

That one's the one — full body, standing, alive. The tall canvas fixed it exactly like I said. I drew another because I couldn't leave a good thing alone and that's me, not the tool.

Here's the one, Cole. Not an apology for being me about it, but an honest read of what happened.
